{{CargoOrgan
|name=Capricorn Horn
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10889
|idx=100
|description=This horn gives off an intimidating aura, showing off the power of its former owner! It's a wealthy and noble aura...
|skill=
|hp=2190
|def=254
|atk=342
|rush=255
|gene1=Earth DMG +120
|gene2=Earth RES +120
|gene3=Earth DMG +120
|gene4=CRIT +10%
|gene5=Ignore Earth RES +120
|gene6=CRIT +10%
|gene7=Crit DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
